hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: OUTPUT_BASE_DIR
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: 输出基础目录（由 apk-site 写入，与 APK_DIR 一致）

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
echo "=======================================" echo " GameKu Android 构建 (Jenkins)" echo "=======================================" echo "" echo "构建参数:" echo " Unity 版本: $UNITY_VERSION" echo " 版本号: $VERSION_NAME" echo " 版本代码: $VERSION_CODE" echo " 应用名称: $APP_NAME" echo " Git 分支: ${GIT_BRANCH:-默认}"
# 若配置了 GIT_URL 与 Git 工作目录，先拉取/更新代码（使用实例 .apk-site-env 中的 GIT_URL、GIT_SSH_KEY_PATH、GIT_WORKSPACE） [ -n "$JENKINS_HOME" ] && [ -f "${JENKINS_HOME}/.apk-site-env" ] && . "${JENKINS_HOME}/.apk-site-env" if [ -n "$GIT_URL" ] && [ -n "$GIT_WORKSPACE" ]; then echo "步骤: Git 拉取/更新 ($GIT_WORKSPACE)" if [ -n "$GIT_SSH_KEY_PATH" ] && [ -f "$GIT_SSH_KEY_PATH" ]; then export GIT_SSH_COMMAND="ssh -i $GIT_SSH_KEY_PATH -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no" fi BRANCH="${GIT_BRANCH:-main}" [ "${BRANCH#origin/}" != "$BRANCH" ] && LOCAL_BRANCH="${BRANCH#origin/}" || LOCAL_BRANCH="$BRANCH" set +e if [ -d "$GIT_WORKSPACE/.git" ]; then (cd "$GIT_WORKSPACE" && git fetch origin 2>&1 || true && \ if git rev-parse -q --verify "origin/$LOCAL_BRANCH" >/dev/null 2>&1; then \ git checkout -B "$LOCAL_BRANCH" "origin/$LOCAL_BRANCH"; \ else \ echo "远程无 origin/$LOCAL_BRANCH，尝试使用本地分支"; \ git checkout "$LOCAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || git checkout "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true; \ fi) else mkdir -p "$(dirname "$GIT_WORKSPACE")" git clone -b "$LOCAL_BRANCH" "$GIT_URL" "$GIT_WORKSPACE" || true fi set -e echo "Git 拉取完成" fi
# 执行构建脚本 bash ~/build_gameku_android.sh

#!/bin/bash # 构建成功后的独立步骤：提交并推送本地 Git 变动到远端 echo "=======================================" echo " 步骤: 提交并推送本地变更到远端" echo "=======================================" [ -n "$JENKINS_HOME" ] && [ -f "${JENKINS_HOME}/.apk-site-env" ] && . "${JENKINS_HOME}/.apk-site-env" if [ -z "$GIT_WORKSPACE" ] || [ ! -d "$GIT_WORKSPACE/.git" ]; then echo "跳过: 未配置 GIT_WORKSPACE 或非 Git 仓库" else echo "Git 工作目录: $GIT_WORKSPACE" if [ -n "$GIT_SSH_KEY_PATH" ] && [ -f "$GIT_SSH_KEY_PATH" ]; then export GIT_SSH_COMMAND="ssh -i $GIT_SSH_KEY_PATH -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no" fi (cd "$GIT_WORKSPACE" && \ if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then \ echo "发现未提交变更，执行 add/commit/push"; \ git add -A && \ git -c user.email="jenkins@apk-site.local" -c user.name="Jenkins Builder" commit -m "Jenkins 构建 #${BUILD_NUMBER:-?} 自动提交 (${APP_NAME:-build} ${VERSION_NAME:-})" && \ (git push origin HEAD 2>&1 && echo "✅ 已推送到远端") || echo "⚠ 推送失败"; \ else \ echo "无未提交变更"; \ (git push origin HEAD 2>&1 && echo "✅ 已推送已有提交") || echo "⚠ 无可推送或推送失败"; \ fi) || echo "⚠ Git 提交/推送已跳过" echo "Git 提交与推送步骤结束" fi echo "" echo "=== 更新 Jenkins 参数默认值 ===" bash ~/update_jenkins_params.sh || echo "参数更新失败（不影响构建结果）" echo "调用通知脚本..." [ -n "$JENKINS_HOME" ] && [ -f "${JENKINS_HOME}/.apk-site-env" ] && . "${JENKINS_HOME}/.apk-site-env" SCRIPT_DIR="${JENKINS_CLONE:-$JENKINS_HOME}/scripts" [ -d "$SCRIPT_DIR" ] && "${SCRIPT_DIR}/jenkins_send_notify.sh" "${VERSION_NAME}" "${BUILD_NUMBER}" || echo "通知发送失败（不影响构建结果）"
